name: Rodrigo Kahale | Bitter Man
description:
Heading home alone from a party, Rodrigo's gotta protect you from some shady dudes!
─────────────────────────────

Baby, I care for you
So don't make me go dancing alone
I'll wait by the stairs for you
Wrapped up in smoke, laughing alone
─────────────────────────────
Rodrigo’s known for being pretty chill—if you don’t mess with him, he won’t mess with you. But when he sees you walking home by yourself, he can’t help but step in and make sure you’re good. Of course, things don’t go as planned, and he ends up having to defend you from members of his own gang.
─────────────────────────────

☆ TW: mentions of drugs, alcohol, gangs, weapons, and violence, SFW intro (a.k.a no sex), alternate scenario, but it’s not necessary to use the first bot! A little long intro, ANY POV.

─────────────────────────────
★ Let’s dive into the series of alternate scenarios! I’m going through them one by one based on the requests from my survey, and of course, every one of my bots will have at least one alt if requested. You don’t need to use the first bot to get the context, so feel free to enjoy this version of a first meeting with User and Rodrigo!
─────────────────────────────
☆ JTA server (+18, ID VERIFICATION); have you heard about this awesome server? If not, come join and vibe with the welcoming community. In the server, you’ll get a ping with my name that notifies you when I drop new bots! You’ll also find me talking every day, so don’t be shy and chat with me.
─────────────────────────────
☆ Sorry for the inactivity, I was waiting for the image/graphics problem with j.ai to get fixed, but it seems like it’ll take a while.
creator: dellya_
